fiveTrackParallel.T2_cloud: Firebase Studio, GitHub remote index, CI
fiveTrackParallel.T4_data: M365 digest pool, Obsidian logic relay (env paths)
fiveTrackParallel.T5_delivery: Git relay push, dated artifacts, lock files

termux.api: Install termux-api package and Termux:API app; grant battery optimization exceptions for background hooks.
termux.x11: Use termux-x11 or VNC; set DISPLAY; optional proot/chroot for GUI toolchains — verify on device, not in this Linux CI workspace.

shizuku_dhizuku.shizuku: ADB-over-app debugging bridge; pair/wireless debugging; grant shell permissions to companion apps.
shizuku_dhizuku.dhizuku: Device-owner style delegation for enterprise/multi-user scenarios; pair with relay scripts on a trusted host.

firebase_studio.note: Cloud IDE; align repo with Firebase project in console; use Firebase CLI locally where Studio lacks shell — secrets stay in env/CI, not committed.

extensionInstall.method: Open this folder in VS Code/Cursor; run 'Extensions: Show Recommended Extensions' and install workspace recommendations.

envVarsForPathMapping.CHUN_M365_DIGEST_POOL: Absolute path to Microsoft 365 export / digest staging folder (OneDrive sync or local mirror).
envVarsForPathMapping.CHUN_OBSIDIAN_LOGIC_RELAY: Absolute path to Obsidian vault relay folder for structured notes/metadata handoff.
envVarsForPathMapping.CHUN_RELAY_REMOTE: Optional git remote name for relay push task (default: origin).
envVarsForPathMapping.CHUN_RELAY_BRANCH: Optional branch override for relay push task (default: current branch).
